title: MikroTik Cloud Router Switch CRS305-1G-4S+OUT, FiberBox Plus
description: Outdoor 4-port SFP+ switch without fan and with fins on the back with routing option offers Gigabit Ethernet for management or PoE IN power supply, 4 optical SFP+ ports with speed 1/10 Gbps, console RJ45 port, DC connector and terminal block with 24 to 57 V DC supply . The Switch has a very robust chassis with water protection IP66 , the possibility of installation on a wall or a mast, and in the lower part there are doors for 4 cross-head screws and 3 large cable grommets with enough space for… Device Gigabit PoE injector Power adapter 48V/1.2A Wall brackets, screws Hose clamp
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (1) 10/100/1000Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes Optical interfaces (4) 10Gbps Serial port RJ45 Power Power over Ethernet 802.3af, 802.3at, 24 .. 57V DC Power type PoE, DC connector, DC terminal PoE type PoE-In (only) Max. power consumption [W] 17 Power via connector/terminal 24 .. 57V DC Physical characteristics Protection class IP66 Design Outdoor Fans No Chassis design Plastic Operating temperature [°C] 40 up to 70 Width [mm] 200 Height [mm] 330 Depth [mm] 70 Hardware CPU 98DX226S CPU frequency [MHz] 800 CPU cores 1 Internal storage [MB] 16 RAM [MB] 256
